query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): Le Baysca and its website http://lebaysca.fr.
Optionnaly here is the address Wambrechies, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary
Le Baysca is an independent restaurant and bar with exactly **1 location**. Corporate records indicate no affiliation with any larger holding company or hospitality group. Furthermore, the operating entity underwent an early dissolution in December 2024 and was officially removed from the corporate registry in August 2025.

### Corporate Affiliation and Ownership
Le Baysca is operated by the legal entity SARL SCARLINE BAYART (also identified as LE BAYSCA SARL SCARLINE BAYART), registered under SIREN 828581918 and SIRET 82858191800012 [SARL Scarline Bayart - Le Baysca (59118) : siret, siren, TVA, adresse...](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/sarl-scarline-bayart-59/entreprise-828581918). 

The business was founded in 2017 by the couple Marie and Arthur Bayart [Le Baysca | Cuisine de saison, créative et généreuse à Wambrechies](https://lebaysca.fr/). The restaurant's name, "Baysca," is a contraction of the founders' surnames: Bayart and Scarline [Depuis un an, créativité et convivialité mijotent au Baysca - La Voix du Nord](https://www.lavoixdunord.fr/399937/article/2018-06-19/depuis-un-creativite-et-convivialite-mijotent-au-baysca). Marie Bayart served as the chef of the restaurant, while Arthur Bayart managed the dining room [Le restaurant | Le Baysca](https://lebaysca.fr/le-restaurant/), [Société LE BAYSCA SARL SCARLINE BAYART : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/le-baysca-sarl-scarline-bayart-828581918). 

Corporate records confirm that there is no holding company associated with the business, establishing it as a fully independent operation [SARL Scarline Bayart - Le Baysca (59118) : siret, siren, TVA, adresse...](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/sarl-scarline-bayart-59/entreprise-828581918).

### Location Count
The official website for Le Baysca identifies only a single location, headquartered at 505 Rue Obert, 59118 Wambrechies, France [Le restaurant | Le Baysca](https://lebaysca.fr/le-restaurant/), [Société SARL SCARLINE BAYART à WAMBRECHIES - SIREN : 828581918](https://rubypayeur.com/societe/sarl-scarline-bayart-828581918). The website does not feature a "store locator" or list any additional locations [Le restaurant | Le Baysca](https://lebaysca.fr/le-restaurant/). 

Therefore, the total number of locations owned and operated by this entity is **1**.

### Current Operational Status
The operating company was structured as a Société à responsabilité limitée (SARL) with a capital of 8,000.00 € [Société SARL SCARLINE BAYART à WAMBRECHIES - SIREN : 828581918](https://rubypayeur.com/societe/sarl-scarline-bayart-828581918). 

The partners decided on an early dissolution (dissolution anticipée) of the company on December 31, 2024 [SARL Scarline Bayart - Le Baysca (59118) : siret, siren, TVA, adresse...](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/sarl-scarline-bayart-59/entreprise-828581918). Arthur Bayart, who had held a management role since March 29, 2017, was appointed as the Liquidator [Société LE BAYSCA SARL SCARLINE BAYART : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/le-baysca-sarl-scarline-bayart-828581918). The company was officially radiated from the Lille Metropole Trade and Companies Register (RCS) on August 6, 2025 [SARL Scarline Bayart - Le Baysca (59118) : siret, siren, TVA, adresse...](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/sarl-scarline-bayart-59/entreprise-828581918).

### Gaps and Limitations
- The provided sources do not contain the SIRET or SIREN directly on the restaurant's website legal notices, though external corporate registries successfully matched the entity to the founders and address.
- Because the company was formally dissolved and radiated from the corporate registry in 2025, the establishment is no longer active. No financial performance data or reasons for the closure were provided in the findings.
